sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37904" key="e)paiti/nda" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαιτίνδα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παίζειν</foreign> play <sense id="n37904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at beggars,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg004.perseus-grc1:1:495" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.495</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
